area.value: an unattended object weighing 1 lb. or less whose longest dimension is 6 inches or less

description.value: You call a specific nonliving item directly to your hand from a nearby location. First, you must cast the spell on the item while holding it. Thereafter, you can summon the item by speaking a special word (set by you when the spell is cast) and snapping your fingers. The item appears instantly in your hand. If the item is in the possession of another creature, the spell fails. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Chronicles: Classic Treasures Revisited.
